name: Spectate
desc: Spectator mode player teleports to another entity or player by UUID. Only works in spectator gamemode (3).

fields.name: targetUUID
fields.desc: UUID of the entity to spectate/follow

encoding: UUID as two longs (most/least significant bits)
notes: Only processed by the server if the player is in spectator mode (gamemode=3). The server teleports the player's camera to the target entity's position. MultiAura modules (Aqua 13, Memeware 7.3) use C18 to teleport to targets for aura attack sequences.

modules.name: Freecam
modules.purpose: Teleport spectator to another entity. Used by Freecam for entity tracking.
